TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Vecekadan, title = Vecekadan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vecekadan} }

S.FORM: alang Vecekadan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 277 buwan, 836 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 816 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 20 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 92%, Rukay 2%, Amis 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Vecekadan hya' ga Zayazayan. tay 'zil na Vecekadan hya' ga Laulauzan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Vecekadan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 277 buwan, 836 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 816 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 20 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 92%, Rukay 2%, Amis 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Vecekadan hya' ga Zayazayan. tay 'zil na Vecekadan hya' ga Laulauzan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *eʦ~ʨeka*an ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu maka ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *eʦ~ʨeka*an ħjaʔ ɣa zajazajan. taj ʔzil na *eʦ~ʨeka*an ħjaʔ ɣa laulauzan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
